NODE_ENV.issue: Skips devDependencies installation which are often required for building (webpack, typescript, etc.)
NODE_ENV.recommendation: Uncheck "Available at Buildtime" or use "development" during build

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.recommendation: Remove from build-time variables or set to false

YARN_PRODUCTION.recommendation: Remove from build-time variables or set to false

COMPOSER_NO_DEV.issue: Skips require-dev packages which may include build tools
COMPOSER_NO_DEV.recommendation: Set as "Runtime only" or remove from build-time variables

MIX_ENV.issue: Production mode may skip development dependencies needed for compilation
MIX_ENV.recommendation: Use "dev" for build or set as "Runtime only"

RAILS_ENV.issue: May affect asset precompilation and dependency handling

RACK_ENV.issue: May affect dependency handling and build behavior

BUNDLE_WITHOUT.issue: Excludes gem groups that may contain build dependencies
BUNDLE_WITHOUT.recommendation: Remove from build-time variables or adjust groups

FLASK_ENV.issue: May affect debug mode and development tools availability
FLASK_ENV.recommendation: Usually safe, but consider "development" for complex builds

DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE.issue: Production settings may disable debug tools needed during build
DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE.recommendation: Use development settings for build phase

APP_ENV.issue: May affect dependency installation and build optimizations

ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT.issue: May affect build-time configurations and optimizations
ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT.recommendation: Usually safe, but verify build requirements

CI.issue: Changes behavior in many tools (disables interactivity, changes caching)
CI.recommendation: Usually beneficial for builds, but be aware of behavior changes
